subcodes.first_line: This is a Book from the Word of God and the Manifestation of His Cause unto him whom the breezes of the All-Merciful have turned away from the left [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا کتاب من کلمه الله و مظهر امره الی الذی قلبته روایح الرحمن عن شمال
subcodes.subjects: @rejection by the people of the Bayan, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @piety; righteousness; fear of God [taqwa], @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @the power of words; of speech
